review_policy: A bilingual evaluation-author review confirms semantic equivalence and removes no visually testable requirement. Proper nouns that cannot be inferred visually may remain in the canonical prompt but must not become a TIFA question.

reviews.original_prompt: 비 내리는 서울 골목의 빨간 자전거
reviews.canonical_prompt_en: a red bicycle in a rainy Seoul alley
reviews.notes: Object, color, weather, and alley setting are preserved. Seoul remains context and is excluded from visual QA.

reviews.canonical_prompt_en: a white cat on a green cushion
reviews.notes: Cat color, cushion color, and on-top spatial relation are preserved.

reviews.original_prompt: 노을빛이 드는 조용한 서재의 짙은 남색 소파와 황동 스탠드
reviews.canonical_prompt_en: a deep navy sofa and a brass floor lamp in a quiet study lit by sunset
reviews.notes: Furniture, materials/colors, study setting, and sunset lighting are preserved.

reviews.original_prompt: 비 온 뒤 안개 낀 소나무 숲속의 작은 통나무 오두막
reviews.canonical_prompt_en: a small log cabin in a misty pine forest after rain
reviews.notes: Cabin size/material, pine forest, mist, and after-rain condition are preserved.

reviews.original_prompt: 파란 접시 위의 빨간 사과, 노란 배, 보라색 포도 한 송이
reviews.canonical_prompt_en: a red apple, a yellow pear, and a bunch of purple grapes on a blue plate
reviews.notes: All three fruits, their colors, plate color, and on-plate relation are preserved.

reviews.original_prompt: 공원 벤치 위의 노란 우비, 초록 장화, 빨간 우산
reviews.canonical_prompt_en: a yellow raincoat, green rain boots, and a red umbrella on a park bench
reviews.notes: All objects, colors, and park-bench setting are preserved.

reviews.original_prompt: 탁자 오른쪽의 파란 책 세 권과 왼쪽의 흰 머그
reviews.canonical_prompt_en: three blue books on the right side of a table and a white mug on the left
reviews.notes: Book count/color and the opposing right/left relations are preserved.

reviews.original_prompt: 나무 아래 검은 개 두 마리와 벤치 위 흰 고양이 한 마리
reviews.canonical_prompt_en: two black dogs beneath a tree and one white cat on a bench
reviews.notes: Animal counts, colors, and beneath/on spatial relations are preserved.

reviews.original_prompt: 달빛 아래 한옥 마당을 그린 흑백 수묵화
reviews.canonical_prompt_en: a monochrome ink-wash painting of a hanok courtyard under moonlight
reviews.notes: Hanok courtyard, monochrome ink-wash style, and moonlight are preserved.

reviews.original_prompt: 파스텔 네온 조명의 1980년대 레트로 식당을 표현한 팝아트 포스터
reviews.canonical_prompt_en: a pop-art poster of a 1980s retro diner with pastel neon lighting
reviews.notes: Poster format, pop-art style, 1980s diner setting, and pastel neon lighting are preserved.
